name: Don "Mafioso" Sonnellino / Aphrodisiac Smoke
description:
⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

He's been blowing a lot of smoke in your direction.

Speaking of that, are those heart-shaped seals on his cigars? Cute for a mafia boss.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalog Avatar Creator, edited a bit, bg from that Best Inn game

I know he's smoking a little debbies cake roll in that but I also like that as an accessory for no reason in roblox like its so funny

After all, secondhand smoke can be worse than firsthand. Also cigar bars are a thing!! Thanks Fugget About It for teaching me about that (best show ever never fucking at me i love jimmy falcone maybe he's why I like the sonnellinos so much) i literally love fugget about it i love fugget about it i love it i love it i have a picture of strait mccool hung and framed on my wall

Also I want to picture Don getting excited about a new cigar set he ordered coming to him in the mail like it's me with a new squishmallow

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Thank you to Anon for requesting!

"mafioso bot but his cigar smoke has some sort of aphrodisiac lace to it... and he's engulfing you in smoke just to get you horny with it.. "

Hehe i like this i like you guys you come up with some creative things

Request here!
